tender.title: HBC- The provision of preparation of an affordable housing and tenancy Strategy - AWARD
tender.description:
The Council wishes to appoint a suitably qualified consultant to prepare an Affordable Housing and Tenancy Strategy, for Hertsmere Borough, to sit alongside its upcoming new Local Plan. 
      The objectives of this work are to:
      1) Prepare a position and develop an Affordable Housing Strategy for the Council in order to confirm and evidence the need for specific forms of affordable housing in the borough. The strategy will be used to advise developers on the requirements expected for affordable housing/Section 106 delivery when submitting a planning application and it is anticipated that it will be regularly updated
      
      2) Prepare a position and develop a Tenancy Strategy for the Council to set out matters which Registered Providers of Social Housing should have regard to when formulating their policies for their own stock. The Strategy will ensure the Council compiles with its requirements under the Localism Act 2011
      
      The consultant will have regard for relevant legislation and Council policies including the draft Local Plan, Local Housing Needs Assessment, Allocations Policy and Homelessness and Rough Sleeping Strategy.

classification.description: Research and development services and related consultancy services

address.streetAddress: Olympic Office Centre, 8 Fulton Road, United Kingdom, HA9 0NU

tender.description:
Citizen Housing Group are going out to tender for the Refurbishments of three sheltered care facilities various locations in Coventry.
      
      To express an interest in this project please follow the link below which will take you directly to Citizen`s E-Procurement Portal;
      
      https://in-tendhost.co.uk/citizenhousing/aspx/Home
      
      You will be required to register if you have not already done so previously, and be logged in to be able to download the tender documents.

tender.title: Consultancy Services for Hillbourne Affordable Housing Scheme &  Herbert Avenue Temporary Accommodation
tender.description:
Bournemouth, Christchurch, Poole Council (BCP Council) via Poole Housing Partnership Ltd (PHP) its Arms-length management organisation (ALMO) requires the consultancy services of a Employers Agent, CDM Principal Designer and Cost Consultant to assist in the management and delivery of two projects; namely the Hillbourne Affordable Housing Scheme and the Herbert Avenue Temporary Accommodation Development. 
This contract is divided into two separate Lots:
• Lot 1 - Consultancy Services for Hillbourne Affordable Housing Scheme 
• Lot 2 - Consultancy Services for Herbert Avenue Temporary Accommodation

tender.title: 265.1 - Supported Accommodation
tender.description:
Commissioners are 'calling off' these services via the mechanism of a mini competition from the Deal 2030 Care and Support Ethical Framework. Specifically, Lot 5 'Supported Living for People with Learning Disabilities, Autism or Physical Disabilities' and Lot 9 'Complex Care and Support including Transforming Care'. 

Supported living provides support to enable people to live as independently as possible, including help with day to day living at home, through direct support, assistive technology equipment and adaptations that can help to make life easier, maintain independence and health and wellbeing.

additionalClassifications.description: Other community, social and personal services
